zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Robert Dymoke於1461年出生在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比時，他的父親Sir Thomas Dymoke33歲，母親Margaret Welles27歲。他於大約1489年與Jane Cressnore在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1544年4月13日在英國林可爾史爾維洛賀比享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Robert Dymoke于1461年出生在英国林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Dymoke33岁，母亲Margaret Welles27岁。他于大约1489年与Jane Cressnore在英国林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1544年4月13日在英国林可爾史爾維洛賀比享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Robert Dymoke was born in 1461, in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Dymoke, was 33 and his mother, Margaret Welles, was 27. He married Jane Cressnore about 1489, in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 13 April 1544, in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 83, and was buried in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Robert Dymoke est né en 1461, à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Dymoke, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Welles, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Jane Cressnore environ 1489, à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 avril 1544, à Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Robert Dymoke 1461 in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Dymoke 33 und seine Mutter Margaret Welles 27. Er hat um 1489 in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England Jane Cressnore geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. April 1544 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Robert Dymoke è nato il nel 1461 nel Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Dymoke, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Welles, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Jane Cressnore circa 1489, nel Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 aprile 1544, nel Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Robert Dymokeが1461年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Dymokeは33歳，母Margaret Wellesは27歳であった。約1489年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビーでJane Cressnoreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1544年4月13日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウィロウビーで83歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールンカストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Robert Dymoke(이)가 1461년 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Dymoke(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Welles(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1489년 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에서 Jane Cressnore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1544년 4월 13일 영국 링코실르 윌루그h비에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 호른카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Robert Dymoke nasceu em 1461, em Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Dymoke, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Welles, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Cressnore aproximadamente 1489, em Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de abril de 1544, em Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Robert Dymoke родился в 1461 г. в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Dymoke было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Welles, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Cressnore около 1489 г. в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 апреля 1544 г. в местности уиллоугби, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности хаурнкастл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Robert Dymoke nació en 1461, en Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Dymoke, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margaret Welles, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Jane Cressnore aproximadamente 1489, en Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de abril de 1544, en Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
